title: felicia fruticosa subsp. fruticosa
intro: Felicia fruticosa subsp. fruticosa, also known as Cape daisy or Blue felicia, is a perennial plant native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and flowers have been shown to possess several health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress and infections. Felicia fruticosa subsp. fruticosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
